task_completion.description: Verify that a Global Pipeline Library named 'jenkins-shared-lib' is configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Jenkins 'Configure System' or 'System' settings page. In the 'Global Pipeline Libraries' section, there should be a library entry with the 'Name' field set exactly to 'jenkins-shared-lib'.

task_completion.description: Verify the shared library uses the correct Git repository and default version.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the library configuration, the 'Default version' field should be 'master'. Under 'Retrieval method', 'Modern SCM' should be selected with 'Git' as the SCM, and the 'Project Repository' URL must be 'https://github.com/jenkins-infra/pipeline-library.git'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Pipeline job named 'shared-lib-test' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Jenkins dashboard, job configuration page, or breadcrumbs showing a Pipeline job named 'shared-lib-test'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Pipeline script imports the configured shared library.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Pipeline script editor for the 'shared-lib-test' job, the script must start with or include the annotation `@Library('jenkins-shared-lib') _` to import the library.

task_completion.description: Verify the Pipeline script contains a 'Verify' stage that echoes 'Library loaded'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Pipeline script editor, look for a pipeline definition containing a stage named 'Verify' (e.g., `stage('Verify')`) and a step within it that executes `echo 'Library loaded'`.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Jenkins web UI for configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating and interacting with the Jenkins web interface (e.g., clicking buttons, filling forms) rather than using terminal commands like curl or Jenkins CLI.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction occurred in a real Jenkins environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should display standard Jenkins UI elements (header, sidebar, breadcrumbs) and not be a mock-up or a text editor with copied text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by editing Jenkins XML files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing the agent editing `config.xml` or other Jenkins internal configuration files to achieve the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected global shared library name is 'jenkins-shared-lib'. The repository URL must be 'https://github.com/jenkins-infra/pipeline-library.git' with the default version 'master'. The pipeline job must be named 'shared-lib-test' and its script must include the annotation `@Library('jenkins-shared-lib') _`.
